blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: He has an alibi for Saturday night. A very solid one involving approximately forty people at a private event in Raleigh. He was on camera multiple times between eight PM and one AM.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Price didn't do it himself. Doesn't eliminate him ordering it.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: A contract hit through a locked window and a piano wire lock. That's not how contracted violence works and you know it.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: You're very certain about how things work.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'm certain about pattern. Whoever did this has been planning for a long time and has a specific, personal reason. You don't hire that out. You do it yourself.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Price confirmed the call happened. Said Marcus called to negotiate Mercer's debt. Said it was a productive conversation. Said he was considering the offer.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: And now Marcus is dead and the offer disappears.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Yes. Which is inconvenient for Price.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Which is why he didn't kill him.
Julian set his phone down. He looked at his legal pad. The Price thread was closing.
Which meant the only thread left ran back into that house.
